description: When snow falls, head to the gentle slopes near Münster for exhilarating sledding runs.

locationInfo.lighting: Open area — good natural light in daytime
locationInfo.description: A natural slope near the stadium that transforms into a popular sledding hill after snowfall.
safetyTips: Check slope for obstacles before sledding

description: Browse stalls, sip Glühwein, and enjoy the festive atmosphere of Münster's winter market.

locationInfo.description: One of Germany's most charming Christmas markets, set against the historic gabled townhouses of the Prinzipalmarkt.
safetyTips: Keep bags close in crowded areas
Be aware of open fire hazards near stalls

description: Explore Münster on two wheels along its famous Promenade ring or riverside paths.

locationInfo.description: A 4.5 km tree-lined ring encircling the old city, beloved by cyclists and pedestrians alike.

description: Trek through forested trails on the outskirts of Münster and breathe in the fresh air.
groupSuitability: Great for individuals, couples, or small groups

locationInfo.lighting: Low lighting under tree canopy — bring a torch in winter
locationInfo.description: A network of well-marked trails through mixed woodland on the western edge of Münster.

description: Organise a casual kick-about on one of Münster's public sports fields.

locationInfo.description: Public football pitches with marked fields — first come, first served.
safetyTips: Check pitch availability during busy periods

description: Glide on the ice at Münster's main rink — great fun for all abilities in the winter months.
groupSuitability: Suitable for individuals, couples, and small groups

locationInfo.description: Münster's indoor ice rink offering public skating sessions throughout the winter season.

description: A low-impact full-body workout using poles along Münster's flat trails.
groupSuitability: Suitable for individuals or small groups

locationInfo.lighting: Well-lit paths suitable for early mornings
locationInfo.description: Flat, paved routes with minimal traffic — ideal for Nordic walking technique.
safetyTips: Use rubber tips on poles to protect pavement
Warm up wrists and shoulders first

description: Tackle bouldering walls and roped routes at Münster's climbing gym — great year-round.
groupSuitability: Suitable for individuals, couples, and small groups

locationInfo.description: Modern bouldering and lead-climbing walls suitable for all skill levels, from complete beginners to advanced climbers.
safetyTips: Complete safety briefing before first visit
Spot your partner on bouldering walls
